ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Optional. Without a key, diagrams are rendered anonymously with a watermark. Get a key at beauty-diagram.com/account/api-keys.
ast.target: 可选。没有密钥时，图表将以匿名方式渲染并带有水印。请在 beauty-diagram.com/account/api-keys 获取密钥。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Applied to all diagrams that don't specify their own theme.
ast.target: 应用于所有未指定自身主题的图表。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Max-width applied to every rendered diagram. Override per page by adding `bd-width: 800px` to the note front-matter (or run the "Set image width for this page" command). Accepts the 4 presets or any CSS length (e.g. `720px`, `75%`, `40em`).
ast.target: 应用于每个渲染图表的最大宽度。可通过在笔记前置元数据中添加 `bd-width: 800px`（或运行“为此页面设置图片宽度”命令）来按页面覆盖。接受4个预设值或任何CSS长度（例如 `720px`、`75%`、`40em`）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When off, Obsidian renders mermaid blocks itself.
ast.target: 关闭时，Obsidian 自行渲染 mermaid 代码块。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Obsidian has no built-in PlantUML rendering. Off leaves fences as plain text.
ast.target: Obsidian 没有内置的 PlantUML 渲染。关闭时，代码围栏将作为纯文本保留。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 延迟加载滚出屏幕的图表。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Walks every Markdown file in the vault. Idempotent — re-runs leave existing embeds untouched.
ast.target: 遍历库中的每个 Markdown 文件。幂等操作 — 重新运行不会影响已有的嵌入。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Removes embed blocks whose source fence has been deleted.
ast.target: 移除源代码围栏已被删除的嵌入块。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Re-run injection on every Markdown save. Off by default.
ast.target: 在每次保存 Markdown 时重新运行注入。默认关闭。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Override for development. Leave at default in production.
ast.target: 开发覆盖项。生产环境中请保持默认值。

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 替换内置 mermaid 渲染

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 处理 plantuml 代码围栏

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Embed share URLs into this note
ast.target: 将分享网址嵌入此笔记

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Embed share URLs into this vault

ast.target: 为此页面的图表选择最大宽度…

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Beauty Diagram: Restart Obsidian for this to take effect.
ast.target: Beauty Diagram：请重启 Obsidian 以使更改生效。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Set your Beauty Diagram API key in plugin settings first, then run this command. Watermark-free preview requires an API key to mint share tokens.
ast.target: 请先在插件设置中设置您的 Beauty Diagram API 密钥，然后运行此命令。无水印预览需要 API 密钥来生成分享令牌。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Watermark-free preview requires a Pro plan. Free users still get unlimited anonymous preview with watermark. Upgrade at https://www.beauty-diagram.com/pricing
ast.target: 无水印预览需要专业版计划。免费用户仍可享受带水印的无限匿名预览。请在 https://www.beauty-diagram.com/pricing 升级。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Couldn't verify your plan. Check your network and API key, then run "Beauty Diagram: Verify API key" first.
ast.target: 无法验证您的计划。请检查您的网络和 API 密钥，然后先运行“Beauty Diagram：验证 API 密钥”。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Beauty Diagram: no Markdown file open.
ast.target: Beauty Diagram：没有打开的 Markdown 文件。

ast.name: aria-label
ast.source: Open this diagram's source in the Beauty Diagram editor (edits don't sync back to this note)
ast.target: 在 Beauty Diagram 编辑器中打开此图表的源代码（编辑不会同步回此笔记）
